name: Amos
title: Shepherd Prophet
summary: A humble shepherd chosen by God to call Israel to repentance.
facts: Spoke boldly against kings and priests

name: Jeroboam II
title: King of Israel
summary: A powerful king during Israel’s economic prosperity but spiritual decline.

name: Amaziah
title: Priest of Bethel
summary: A priest who opposed Amos and tried to silence his prophecy.
